title: OX15 0SX, Mr Edward Deeley, Mr Richard Deeley and Mrs Rebecca Deeley (Trading as W.S Deeley & Son : environmental permit issued - EPR/LP3738JH/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mr Edward Deeley, Mr Richard Deeley and Mrs Rebecca Deeley (Trading as W.S Deeley & Son) Installation name: Leadenporch Farm Permit number: EPR/LP3738JH  "
